testsuite.name: tests.PositiveTest

testcase.name: Заполнение всех полей формы студента, и проверка на соответствие

failure.message: Element should have partial text "26 December,2007" {.table-responsive/by text: Date of Birth/By.xpath: ..} Element: '<tr>Date of Birth 26 November,2007</tr>' Actual value: text="Date of Birth 26 November,2007" Screenshot: file:/D:/Kr.Tech/guru/guru.qa.HW-11_Jenkins_UI/build/reports/tests/1775743286326.0.png Page source: file:/D:/Kr.Tech/guru/guru.qa.HW-11_Jenkins_UI/build/reports/tests/1775743286326.0.html Timeout: 4 s.

testcase.failure: Element should have partial text "26 December,2007" {.table-responsive/by text: Date of Birth/By.xpath: ..} Element: '<tr>Date of Birth 26 November,2007</tr>' Actual value: text="Date of Birth 26 November,2007" Screenshot: file:/D:/Kr.Tech/guru/guru.qa.HW-11_Jenkins_UI/build/reports/tests/1775743286326.0.png Page source: file:/D:/Kr.Tech/guru/guru.qa.HW-11_Jenkins_UI/build/reports/tests/1775743286326.0.html Timeout: 4 s. at app//com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebElementSource.handleError(WebElementSource.java:149) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebElementSource.checkConditionAndReturnElement(WebElementSource.java:127) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebElementSource.checkCondition(WebElementSource.java:104) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.commands.Should.execute(Should.java:30) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.commands.Should.execute(Should.java:14) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.commands.Commands.execute(Commands.java:165) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.impl.SelenideElementProxy.dispatchAndRetry(SelenideElementProxy.java:132) at app//com.codeborne.selenide.impl.SelenideElementProxy.invoke(SelenideElementProxy.java:84) at app/jdk.proxy3/jdk.proxy3.$Proxy23.shouldHave(Unknown Source) at app//pages.components.ComparisonFieldsComponent.checkField(ComparisonFieldsComponent.java:16) at app//pages.components.ComparisonFieldsComponent.comparisonFieldsPositiveTest(ComparisonFieldsComponent.java:25) at app//tests.PositiveTest.practiceFormTest(PositiveTest.java:65) at java.base@21.0.7/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base@21.0.7/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base@21.0.7/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
